title: VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC - 211info
text: VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF LANE COUNTY VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary health care, mental health evaluations, and counseling. Services include routine physicals, women’s health care, behavioral health care, diabetes management, and counseling, physical therapy, specialty care and referrals to specialists, respiratory therapy, and smoking cessation. Has a pharmacy on-site where patients have access to some medications at no charge. 2260 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: -Age 18 and older -Gross household income 85%-300% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Uninsured patients who meet Volunteers In Medicine eligibility guidelines -Patients who do not qualify for any state funded health care -Oregon Health Plan and Medicare patients not yet assigned to a provider or unable to get a provider -Insured patients with a deductible of $2,500 or more -Medical condition not caused by a motor vehicle accident covered by insurance or a work-related illness or injury that involves Workers' Compensation coverage. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm, Tuesday 1:30pm-5pm and 5:30pm-8pm (541) 685-1800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 685-1800 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and pre-screening interview FEES: None. Donations encouraged. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County and Cities of Harrisburg and Monroe SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm, Tuesday 1:30pm-5pm and 5:30pm-8:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Buses 43, 41, 30, 36A Services: Community Clinics Diabetes Management Clinics General Laboratory Tests Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Smoking/Vaping Cessation Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
